title: MegaLoot
body:
Mega loot is the evolution of the mod Weapon Case Loot, using the swords and bows from that mod, and adding armor and in the future, tools.

You get cases that contain loot of three different rarities: Common, Rare and Epic, all cases can contain either swords, bows or armor. Items have different properties like max attack damage and atributes like multi shot, effects on hit (wither, levitation, poison, etc.). For armor it can increase player max health, add knockback resistance, etc.

The models are those used in weapon case loot.

Enjoy looting!

This mods requires the Baubles mod.
